title: XPlus Autofish (Fabric / Forge / NeoForge)
description: Automatically reel in and recast the fishing rod when fish bites. Including useful options and bugfixs.
body:
## About XPlus Autofish
XPlus autofish is a successor mod to the MrTroot's autofish mod, including bugfixs and new features.

**If you are looking for autofish mod for 1.19.4-, please check out https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/autofish .**

## Introduction
In short, just cast the fishing rod into the water once, and it will automatically reel in at the correct time and recast after a couple-second wait. You can open the config screen of the mod via hotkey (V by default).

![Autofish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2H1rLgy4/images/4d63243ed97733b1fd07b2d704be3448cca3b30e.gif)

## Config Screen
- **Autofish**: Easily toggle the entire mod on or off.
- **MultiRod**: Automatically switch to the next fishing rod in your hotbar after using one, allowing you to fish for extended periods.
- **Break Protection**: Ignore fishing rods that are almost broken, preserving your enchanted rods.
- **Persistent Mode**: Keep the fishing rod casted out at all times, automatically recasting it every 10 seconds if necessary. It is useful for dealing with server lag or plugin-related hook clearing.
- **Sound-Based Detection**: In multiplayer, use sounds instead of motion to detect catches. Note that proximity and nearby players' hooks may affect accuracy.
- **Recast Delay**: Adjust the time interval between reeling in and recasting the rod.
- **Clearlag Chat Pattern**: Some servers clear entities, including fish hooks, to reduce lag and send a chat message when doing so. When the specified chat pattern is matched, the mod will recast the hook.
- **Random Delay**: Add random delay between the reeling in and recasting.
- **Open Water Detection**: Automatically detect whether you are fishing in an open area, which allows you to get treasure loot.

## FAQ
**Q: The auto fishing feature does not work with rods added by mods (such as Aquaculture 2, etc.)**

A: Try enabling "Use Sound Detection" and "Force Multiplayer Detection (Mod Compatibility)" in the config screen of XPlus Autfish (Press V to open by default).

## Installation
- For the **Fabric versions 1.19.4-1.21.11**, [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) are needed.
- For the **Fabric versions 26.1+**, [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) are needed.
- For the **Forge or NeoForged versions 1.18.2-1.21.11**, only [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) is needed.
- For the **NeoForge versions 26.1+**, [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) is needed.

![](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/3a5554246606e569b8e5dabc8ff365140614cd583b42c6fa14a493bd021cf235/68747470733a2f2f66726f67672e69652f4e676f)
